mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a decrease in demand for new construction, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals a decrease in supply, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the consumer price index signals an increase in demand for goods and services, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in any-regime periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor participation rate signals an increase in the labor force, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the retail sales index signals a decrease in demand for goods and services, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.06 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
